description: 5 should-trigger + 5 should-not-trigger queries. Multi-skill co-activation (e.g. php-coder alongside pest-testing on a test query) is accepted as TP where writing PHP code is a legitimate sub-task. Near-misses share PHP/Laravel vocabulary without being code-generation tasks.

queries.q: my UserController is getting huge, split it into a service
write a class for parsing CSV files with proper type hints
refactor this foreach to use array_map but keep it readable
add a __toString method to this DTO and make fields readonly
this legacy controller mixes config and business logic, clean it up
run phpstan on this file and show me all errors
create a migration for adding a phone column to users
set up docker-compose for this PHP project
write a Pest test for the UserRepository
queries.note: T-class: co-activation with pest-testing is accepted — Pest tests are PHP code, loading php-coder alongside pest-testing is legitimate multi-skill support

queries.q: explain what strict_types does in PHP
